return(function(V,C,J,q,x,P,T,Y,G,L,n,S,y,d,R,E,v,l,i,M,o,B,w)y,B,i,M,n,l,Y,E,L,S,o,G,R,w,v,d=function(V,Z)local C=R(Z)local J=function(J,q,x)return G(V,{J;q,x},Z,C)end return J end,function(V,Z)local C=R(Z)local J=function()return G(V,{},Z,C)end return J end,function(V,Z)local C=R(Z)local J=function(...)return G(V,{...},Z,C)end return J end,function(V,Z)local C=R(Z)local J=function(J,q,x,P,T,d)return G(V,{J;q,x;P,T;d},Z,C)end return J end,function(G,J,q,x)local Yi={}local
